title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MONKAYO, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 16162 / 65 OG No. 47, 13017 (November 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5566, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MONKAYO, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Sec. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1969.
